title: Release version 0.5.0
description: Minor version release: integrated rich library for enhanced UI with formatted tables, styled panels, and welcome screen

title: Release version 0.5.0
description: Minor version release 0.6.0: Complete update command implementation - renamed upgrade to update, added tool source update, and tool update commands

title: Release version 0.4.0
description: Minor version release: package renamed to guppi-cli, README updated with user installation instructions

title: Update init.py to register GUPPI for all detected agents
description: Replace CLAUDE_SKILLS_DIR with get_active_targets(). Update messaging from 'Claude Code' to combined agent names. Exit with error if no agents detected.

title: Update skill.py to register/unregister skills for all detected agents
description: Replace CLAUDE_SKILLS_DIR with get_active_targets() in _sync_skill_md and _remove_skill_md. Combined output message listing agent names.

title: Create src/guppi/agents.py with agent target registry
description: New module with AGENT_TARGETS dict mapping agent names to skill directories. get_active_targets() returns only agents whose config dir exists (~/.claude, ~/.kiro). Auto-detect, no config needed.

title: Multi-agent support: register skills to both Claude Code and Kiro
description: Replace hardcoded ~/.claude/skills/ registration with auto-detection of installed agents. Register SKILL.md to all detected agent skill directories (~/.claude/skills/, ~/.kiro/skills/). No breaking changes for existing users.

title: Update cli.py to register skill command
description: Add skill command to cli.py, update router known subcommands list, update help text references from tool to skill.
close_reason: skill.py created, cli.py updated, e2e verified: install/uninstall/search all working with SKILL.md auto-registration

title: Create skill.py command module
description: Create src/guppi/commands/skill.py by adapting tool.py: rename tool→skill, drop init command, add SKILL.md copy to ~/.claude/skills/ on install/update/uninstall. Find SKILL.md from installed package site-packages via force-include.
close_reason: skill.py created, cli.py updated, e2e verified: install/uninstall/search all working with SKILL.md auto-registration

title: Enhance 'tool list' to show source and description
description: Add Source and Description columns to 'tool list' output. Currently only shows 'Tool, Location' but users can't see where installed tool came from or what it does. Need to either: (1) query tool metadata after finding executable, (2) maintain installation registry, or (3) parse 'uv tool list' output for metadata. Recommended: use 'uv tool list' with JSON if available.

title: Enhance 'tool search' to show source location/URL
description: Add Source Location/URL column to 'tool search' output. Currently shows 'Tool, Source, Description' but source is just a name. Should show the actual git URL or local path so users understand provenance. Example: 'github.com/samdengler/guppi-tools' or '~/dev/local-tools'.

title: Standardize column headers across all tool commands
description: Use consistent casing (Title Case) and terminology across all table headers. Currently 'tool source list' uses 'NAME/TYPE/LOCATION' while 'tool list' uses 'Tool/Location'. Should use consistent style like 'Tool/Source/Location' throughout.

title: Test tool list output with 0, 1, and multiple tools
Update tool.py to use format_tool_list_table instead of format_tool_list_panel
Convert format_tool_list_panel to format_tool_list_table using Table
Add shorten_path() helper function to ui.py
Update guppi tool list to use table format like search
Manual smoke test of tool uninstall
description: Perform manual testing: install a tool, uninstall with confirmation, verify removal. Test --yes flag, name variants, and error messages. Document any issues found.

title: Write tests for tool uninstall command
description: Create test_tool_uninstall.py with tests for: basic uninstall, confirmation prompt, name variants (with/without guppi- prefix), error cases (tool not installed, uv not found), --yes flag behavior.

title: Add tool_uninstall function to tool.py
description: Add the tool_uninstall command function to src/guppi/commands/tool.py following the design in docs/design/TOOL_UNINSTALL.md. Includes name normalization, validation, confirmation prompt, and uv tool uninstall execution.

title: Implement guppi tool uninstall command
Consolidate template directories to use only tool/
Write tests for tool init command
description: Create comprehensive tests covering: minimal/example templates, source validation, tool name sanitization, error cases (invalid source, existing tool, git failures), and successful tool generation.

title: Implement tool init command logic
description: Add init() command to commands/tool.py with source directory validation, tool directory creation, template rendering, and git initialization. Include proper error handling for all failure cases.

title: Add name sanitization utilities
description: Implement sanitize_tool_name() and tool_name_to_package() helper functions for converting tool names to valid Python package names (lowercase, hyphens to underscores).

title: Create tool template files
description: Create template directory structure and files for tool initialization: templates/tool/{pyproject.toml, README.md, gitignore, __init__.py, cli.py} and templates/tool-example/cli.py with example commands.

title: Implement guppi tool init command
description: Create a new command that initializes GUPPI tools within a source directory, mirroring the pattern of 'guppi tool source init'. See docs/design/TOOL_INIT.md for full design specification.

title: Implement 'guppi tool update' command
description: Add tool update command to update installed guppi-* tools using uv tool upgrade. Supports updating all tools or a specific tool by name.

title: Rename upgrade command to update
Add 'source update' subcommand to tool command
Implement rich library UI integration
description: Add rich dependency and implement styled UI for tool search, tool list, and main help

title: Implement rich library UI integration
description: Implement design from docs/design/RICH_UI_INTEGRATION.md: add rich dependency, create UI helpers, update tool search/list/help with styled output

title: Design: Integrate rich library for enhanced UI
description: Design integration of rich library for formatted tables, styled panels, and improved help screens

title: Add user installation instructions to README
description: README should include both user installation (uv tool install guppi-cli) and local development instructions

title: Update documentation to reference guppi-cli package name
description: Update README.md, RELEASE.md, and MVP_DESIGN.md to use 'guppi-cli' package name instead of 'guppi'

title: Rename package from 'guppi' to 'guppi-cli'
Implement missing source_init command in tool.py
Fix tool install to use 'uv tool install' instead of 'uv pip install'
description: Currently fails outside IDE because uv pip requires venv. Should use uv tool install for global tool installation.

title: Implement tool discovery from sources
description: Scan ~/.guppi/sources/ for tools. Look for pyproject.toml with [tool.guppi] metadata. Convention over configuration.

title: Update guppi tool install to use cache
description: Make --from optional. If not provided, look up tool in cache and install from there. Still support --from for local dev.

title: Implement guppi tool source add command
description: Clone a tool repository to ~/.guppi/sources/<name>. Usage: guppi tool source add <name> <url>

title: Implement guppi tool update command
description: Update tool sources with git pull. Supports: guppi tool update (all), guppi tool update <source> (specific)

title: Implement Homebrew-style tool source management
description: Add source management (add/update), tool discovery from cache, and install without --from. Cache in ~/.guppi/sources/. Convention over configuration for tool discovery.

title: Implement 'guppi tool install' command with --from support
description: Build tool install command that supports: guppi tool install <name> --from <github-repo-or-local-path>. Should use uv to install the tool package.

title: Create example dummy tool in guppi-tools repo
description: Build a simple example tool to prove the routing works. Can be a basic shell script or Python CLI that responds to commands.

title: Test end-to-end: guppi dummy command
description: Install guppi, install dummy tool, verify that 'guppi dummy test' successfully routes to the tool and works.

title: Build ultra-lean GUPPI core CLI with command routing
description: Create minimal Python CLI that routes commands to tools. Just needs: pyproject.toml, basic Typer app, subprocess routing to guppi-<tool> executables.

title: Implement conversation history storage and retrieval
Implement SQLite storage layer for conversations and config
Build simple pattern-matching NLP for common commands
Create bd integration wrapper for task management
Set up Go project structure with Cobra CLI framework
GUPPI CLI MVP
description: Build GUPPI - a Python-based plugin framework for composing deterministic tools. MVP: Core CLI (Typer), tool registry/discovery, tool installation via uv, command routing to tools, example scaffolds.

title: Update SKILL.md and AGENTS.md to reference multi-agent support
description: Update SKILL.md docs to mention both Claude Code and Kiro. Update AGENTS.md workflow section if needed. Keep allowed-tools frontmatter as-is.

title: Add tests for agents.py registry logic
description: Test get_active_targets() in isolation: mock home dir with ~/.claude only, ~/.kiro only, both, neither. Verify correct targets returned in each case.

title: Support branch in GitHub URL for skill source add
close_reason: Implemented branch parsing from GitHub URLs in source add

title: Test skill command end-to-end
description: Verify: guppi skill source list, guppi skill install spiker (from guppi-skills source), check ~/.claude/skills/spiker/SKILL.md exists, guppi skill uninstall spiker removes both uv tool and SKILL.md.
close_reason: skill.py created, cli.py updated, e2e verified: install/uninstall/search all working with SKILL.md auto-registration

title: Rename design docs to YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md convention
Add confirmation prompts to destructive operations
description: Currently only 'tool uninstall' and 'uninstall' have --yes/-y flags for confirmation. Consider adding confirmation prompts to other potentially destructive operations like 'tool install' (overwrites existing), 'source add' (if name exists). This improves safety and user confidence. Should follow same pattern: prompt by default, skip with --yes/-y flag.

title: Add search/filter capability to 'tool list'
description: Allow 'tool list [query]' to filter installed tools by name or description, matching the pattern used by 'tool search [query]'. This makes it easier to find specific installed tools without piping to grep. Should filter on both tool name and description (case-insensitive).

title: Update documentation for tool init
description: Add 'guppi tool init' documentation to README.md with examples. Update any relevant guides or quickstart documentation.

title: Add tests for 'guppi tool update' command
description: Add comprehensive tests for tool update command covering success, errors, filtering guppi-* tools, and edge cases.

title: Update documentation for 'guppi tool update'
description: Update README and design docs to document the new tool update command.

title: Update documentation for new update commands
Add tests for update and source update commands

description: Document that feature planning and design should be tracked in docs/design/

title: Implement guppi uninstall command
description: Add 'guppi uninstall' command that removes CLI via uv but preserves .guppi directory. Includes confirmation prompt with --yes flag, helpful messages about preserved config, and reinstall instructions.

title: Write tests for example-tool template files
description: Test that example-tool templates (pyproject.toml, README.md, cli.py, __init__.py) exist and have correct structure for a working GUPPI tool

title: Write tests for cli.py (main entry point and routing)
description: Test main CLI entry point, command routing, and argument parsing

title: Write tests for commands/upgrade.py (upgrade command)
description: Test GUPPI CLI self-upgrade functionality

title: Write tests for commands/tool.py (tool management)
description: Test tool install, uninstall, list, search, and other tool management commands

title: Write tests for router.py (tool routing to guppi-* executables)
description: Test command routing logic, executable discovery, and subprocess invocation for guppi-* tools

title: Write tests for discovery.py (tool discovery from sources)
description: Test discover_tools_in_path, pyproject.toml parsing, and tool metadata extraction

title: Write tests for template directory structure validation
description: Test that all required template files exist in src/guppi/templates/source/ and have correct content format

description: Test that source templates (pyproject.toml, README.md, gitignore) can be loaded and rendered with variable substitution

title: Improve Rich table formatting consistency
description: Enhance visual consistency across all Rich table outputs. Consider: (1) consistent column width strategies, (2) color coding (e.g., installed vs available tools), (3) consistent use of styling for different data types (paths, names, descriptions). Currently both 'search' and 'list' use Rich tables which is good, but could be more visually aligned.
